heading: Extension of prospecting permits
label: 287 Extension of prospecting permits
text: Any prospecting permit issued under this subchapter may be extended by the Secretary of the Interior for a period not exceeding two years, upon a showing of satisfactory cause.
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of , , known as the Mineral Leasing Act, which comprises this chapter.act Feb. 25, 1920, ch. 8541 Stat. 437
